allow: Bash(node -e "for \(const p of ['next-auth','mongoose','zod','motion','recharts','next-cloudinary','sonner','next-themes']\) { try { console.log\(p, require\(p+'/package.json'\).version\) } catch\(e\){ console.log\(p,'ERR',e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\) } }")
